description: Blending plush two-tone leather with foam midsole, these ankle-high shoes from timberland are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. The high top styling with stitch seams at the toe box is a sartorial reference to the spirit of adventure. Wear these with form-fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlaysBrand badge on the lateral side of the heelCentral lace ups with metal ringsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box MidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelAggressive terraced lugs at the fore foot and heelshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
